creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Hidenori Ishikawa wrote:

> Since OpenSSH team has announced the new version of OpenSSH, 3.0.1,
> which fixed some more bugs and security hole,
> I thought it is better to update the FreeBSD port as well.
> 
> Non-portable version of OpenSSH 3.0.1 now requires "readpassphrase"
> which is a function included in libc on OpenBSD platform.
> So, I ported "readpassphrase.{c,h}" from OpenBSD 3.0-current so that
> it can be complied on FreeBSD.

There is already an patch on the ftp server called:
	"openbsd2x_3.0.1.patch"

ports are already in testing ... commit will follow shortly.

kind regards.

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
